name: World Finance
description_short: World Finance at 3000 SW 89th St Suite D, Oklahoma City, OK 73159 in the South Oklahoma City neighborhood is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 265 reviews. Call +1 405-688-9700.
description_long:
World Finance operates a physical branch location in Memphis, Tennessee, serving the local community with personal financial services. The company has been established as a lending and financial services provider, with a branch manager (Rutherford Brannon) and staff committed to personalized customer service.

World Finance's primary offerings include personal installment loans for various purposes, credit-building loan products, tax preparation services, refund advance loans, and roadside assistance. They position themselves as a full-service financial partner for customers managing expenses, building credit history, or handling tax needs. The Memphis branch operates Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5:30 PM, with Saturday hours available by appointment.

The company distinguishes itself through in-person relationship banking, with staff described as knowledgeable and committed to working with customers one-on-one. Their website emphasizes local community presence ("we live here too") and bilingual support ("Hablamos Español"). Google reviews from customers highlight professionalism and responsiveness, with specific praise for staff member Nicole's thorough contract explanation and customer support.

World Finance targets consumers with varying credit profiles, including those building credit for the first time and those managing existing loans. However, as a traditional installment lender, they likely assess creditworthiness through financial history review. The company positions itself for customers seeking flexible lending solutions with personal guidance rather than fully automated online processes.
address: 3000 SW 89th St Suite D, Oklahoma City, OK 73159

company_info.headquarters: 3000 SW 89th St Suite D, Oklahoma City, OK 73159

pros: One-on-one personalized loan consultations with trained staff
Multiple financial products under one roof (loans, tax prep, refund advances, roadside assistance)
Established local presence with dedicated branch manager and community ties
Positive customer reviews highlighting staff professionalism and responsiveness
Educational content available (blog articles on loan management, credit building, secured vs. unsecured loans)
Flexible lending approach for customers with varying credit histories, including first-time borrowers
cons: Limited to single Memphis branch location with no online-only application option mentioned
APR rates and loan terms not disclosed on website
No information provided about credit score requirements or minimum loan amounts
Saturday hours require calling ahead, limiting weekend accessibility
No mention of prepayment penalties or flexible repayment options
best_for: Memphis residents seeking personal loans with in-person guidance
First-time borrowers building credit who benefit from personalized explanation
Customers needing bundled services (loans plus tax preparation)
Spanish-speaking borrowers requiring bilingual financial services
diagnosis: World Finance is best for Memphis-area consumers who prefer in-person relationships and personalized guidance when borrowing, particularly those building credit or managing multiple financial needs simultaneously. The main caveat is lack of transparency around pricing, rates, and terms on their website, requiring customers to contact the branch directly for specific loan details.
